reviews.review_title: So much potential but not quite there..
reviews.review_description:
I feel really unsure giving this a review as it still feels a work in progress.. i think advising there will be new songs every 9 weeks is misleading, but there is a good varied choice of k-pop songs at the moment that would still give hours of gameplay.

I find the maps sometimes lag or doesn't register hits very well, if you like k-pop and beat saber you'll enjoy it, but if you are a perfectionist it might get mildly annoying on the misses.

Hope to see more updates in the future as I worry this is being abandoned, and this could be a real diamond with some polishing!

reviews.review_title: Uses Beat Saber maps without permission
reviews.review_description:
This game is an obvious Beat Saber clone and makes no attempts to hide it. Most of the maps are automatically generated by an automatic mapping tool for Beat Saber named Beat Sage, and the rest are made by Beat Saber mappers who gave no permission for this game's developers to use their maps.

Regardless of the stealing, this is still an awful game and is not worth your money. Your score on a slice could be either "perfect" or "great", but both options do not affect the score. Your score is only determined by your miss count. There are very few maps to play. The graphics and mechanics look like they were designed by a 13 year old in two days.

developer_response.body:
Hello,

Thank you sincerely for sharing your valuable feedback and report.

1. Apology and Clarification Regarding Map Usage and Attribution
We have always strived to credit and properly attribute the work of map creators. However, we acknowledge that our approach may not have been sufficiently clear, which led to some misunderstandings. We sincerely apologize for any confusion this may have caused.
We deeply respect the efforts of creators, and moving forward, we will be more thorough in verifying content usage and enhancing our communication to ensure such issues do not arise again.
We are currently reviewing any potentially problematic content and will promptly address it through updates.

2. Plans to Improve Game Systems and Content
We understand and empathize with concerns regarding the scoring system, map variety, and graphical quality.
We are working on revising the scoring system to reflect different hit judgments and will soon release updates featuring new maps and improved designs.
We are committed to listening closely to player feedback and collaborating with creators to deliver a game that everyone can trust and enjoy.
We will address each shortcoming step by step and strive to present a better version of our game.
Your valuable feedback will continue to guide our improvements.

Thank you.

reviews.review_description: I thought it would be some random K-pop music. It’s not. The game has a very good top K-pop music. I am quite please with the selection. The game is in Korean.  But you don’t need a PHD to figure think out. Like green, yellow and red. It’s easy medium and hard. Again, it’s not rocket science. But English would be nice.  I play this every day. I have a of of fun and the music is excellent.

developer_response.body:
Hello!
Thank you so much for your kind words and valuable feedback.

We are delighted to hear that you are enjoying our game along with the K-pop music selection.
Knowing that our music choices have brought you satisfaction is a great encouragement to our development team.

We would also like to inform you that you can change the language settings in the options menu.
Please feel free to check it out. We are continuously working to expand multi-language support, including English, to ensure players from all around the world can enjoy the game comfortably.

Additionally, we are preparing a major update that will greatly enhance the overall content and service quality.
We will bring you even more fantastic music and exciting features soon, so please stay tuned!

Your continued support means a lot to us, and we will do our best to provide you with an even better experience moving forward.
Thank you again!

reviews.review_description: This would be much better if there were more song options for guy k-pop groups. Also it was very laggy and didn’t seem like the arrows went on beat with the song like it should. besides that the app is alright. not really worth the 10$.

Got this game today & its brilliant only problem is it’s commands are in Japanese & I can’t understand how to change game mode (easy,normal & advance levels) or to challenge in multiplayer. Can anyone tell me how to change the commands into English thanks. I’ll update my review when I can change levels

developer_response.body:
Hello!
Thank you for playing and enjoying the game.

Here’s how you can change the language to English:
Go to the Settings (Options) menu, and you will find the Language Setting. Please select English, and it should make your experience more comfortable.

For difficulty selection (Easy, Normal, Hard), you can choose the level before starting a song.
As for Multiplayer mode, we are continuously working to make it more user-friendly.

We apologize for any inconvenience and appreciate your feedback.
We’ll keep improving to provide you with the best experience.

Thank you!

reviews.review_description: Better then Beat Saver, especially if you love kpop. Hopefully more music will be added. Love to see songs from IU, Punch and Ailee 😁

developer_response.body:
Hello! 
Thank you so much for your kind words and for enjoying the game.
We’re especially happy to hear that K-pop fans like you are having a great time!

We’ve noted your song suggestions for IU, Punch, and Ailee, and we’ll keep them in mind as we expand our music selection.
We’ll continue to bring you even more exciting content, so please look forward to it!

Thank you again! 🎶💜

Thank you so much!
We’re glad you’re having fun and enjoying the game.
We’ll keep working hard to bring you even more great content and an even better experience.
Stay tuned for future updates!

Thank you for your support!

reviews.review_description: I can not figure out how to change the language from Korean to English.  Where is the options menu?

Exactly what the tile says. It’s got the old school colorful feel of a DDR arcade game with arrows to slash instead of step on!
I love beat saber but this has a classic look to it that takes me back to when DDR was released and it comes with a lot more music I like than beat saber. I really hope this keeps getting updated with kpop, or even jpop and any other music would be great too! I’m glad I made this purchase!

developer_response.body:
We appreciate your review so much
We will continue to update DDR memories and new music.
Thanks again for your enjoyment : )

reviews.review_description: It has so many songs! And i love that you can play each one at whatever difficulty you're comfortable with. Though the stayc song is quite challenging even on easy.

developer_response.body:
Hello!
Thank you so much for enjoying our game and playing through so many songs.
We’re also glad to hear that you appreciate being able to choose the difficulty level that suits you best.

We’ve noted your feedback regarding the song feeling difficult even on the easy level.
Our development team will review and work on improving the difficulty balance to ensure that all players can enjoy the game comfortably.

We will continue to bring you great music and a fun experience, so please look forward to future updates.
Thank you once again for your valuable feedback!

reviews.review_description: Game has a nice collection of songs to play with. Different play skill levels helps you to work your way up in skills. Hopefully the developer will keep adding songs to this great game. Hours of fun for the whole family.

developer_response.body:
Hello!
We're sorry we made such a great game alike.
But we will update it to add more great music to make it fun
For your family's fun!
